strategy_decisions.rationale: This range-reacceptance variant still produced 0 trades on valid data. The mechanism fits a chop lane, but the excursion-plus-reacceptance stack remains too participation-sparse for this ETH 4h context, so it should be aborted rather than cosmetically refined.

The deep-reset continuation idea assumes a chop-to-transition continuation burst after reset, but the realized lane remained choppy enough that this expression never engaged and it produced 0 trades on valid data. For this exact packet the honest outcome is abort.

The fakeout re-expansion concept is plausible, but the chosen role assignment still made the confirmation stack too restrictive for this ETH 4h chop lane and yielded 0 trades on valid data. The honest action is abort rather than invented refinement.
